header_info.title: Global Coal Terminals Tracker - December 2024
header_info.citation: Recommended Citation: "Global Energy Monitor, Global Coal Terminals Tracker, December 2024 release." (See the CC license for attribution requirements if sharing or adapting the data set.)
header_info.contact: Contact: Coal Program Director, Global Energy Monitor - flora.champenois@globalenergymonitor.org

entries.name: Proposed
entries.definition: Projects announced or in planning, but not yet under physical construction.

entries.name: Construction
entries.definition: Projects where physical construction has begun.

entries.name: Shelved
entries.definition: Projects officially shelved by a sponsor, or that show no activity over a period of 2 years.

entries.name: Cancelled
entries.definition: Projects officially cancelled by a sponsor, or that show no activity over a period of 4 years.

entries.name: Operating
entries.definition: Terminals that have been formally commissioned or that have entered commercial operation.

entries.name: Mothballed
entries.definition: Terminals that have been deactivated or put into an inactive state but are not retired.

entries.name: Retired
entries.definition: Terminals that have been permanently shut down.
